title: GREENSLEEVES Peach Essential Oil 10ml, 100% Pure Organic Aromatherapy Diffuser Oils (Peach Scent)
description: Product Description We strive to provide you with different essential oils that can accommodate all of your day-to-day activities. GREENSLEEVES aim to provide organic products worldwide, encourage people to stay a healthy lifestyle. Benefits Small and Portable. The smell lasts. 100% Pure and Natural No fillers, additives added It is widely used for you Bottled in a amber glass bottle GREENSLEEVES Peach Essential Oil 10ml 100% Pure and Natural Essential oils are fragrance or essence extracted from plants, fruits or leaves. Essential oils are too strong to use for external use by themselves, always mix essential oils with a carrier oil. Add up to 20 drops of essential oil to 1 ounce of carrier oil. Widely Used in Life, Enjoy the Natural Smell Peach Essential Oil for Diffusion Place 8-10 drops your favorite essential oils for diffuser. The oil will naturally vaporize throughout the room. For best results, use a cool mist and clean your humidifier regularly. Peach Essential Oil for Bathing Adding a few drops of our oils to your bath and soaking for about 15 minutes, which could creates a natural and pure aroma. It's like you took a shower gel. Peach Essential Oil for Massage Adding a small amount of your favorite flavor into carrier essential oils, which could use it to massage apically on your body.
